scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run install:client && npm run install:server
scripts.prepare:public: powershell -Command "if (Test-Path server/public) { Remove-Item -Path server/public -Recurse -Force }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path server/public; Copy-Item -Path client/build/* -Destination server/public -Recurse -Force"
scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run prepare:public
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run dev --prefix server"
